Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Take flight with The Big Reveal as Don Mann (Surviving Mann), Sheriff Mark Lamb (Surviving Mann), and Laura Zaspel (Farm Hero) visit Air Tractor—America’s iconic maker of crop dusters, firefighting, and military aircraft. Witness the power, precision, and pride behind the company proving that American craftsmanship still soars.

programme.title: Real Man TV
programme.desc: Ziplining in Colorado’s Gorges, free falls and donuts. The Real Man show is back in full swing in Colorado. Kyle is joined by special guests and American Patriots as he explores what thrills and adventures this amazing country has to offer. And he’s just getting started.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the contestants narrowed down to 32, Don Mann and Randy Couture reveal a new twist that changes the game: a complex point system that turns survival into a strategic battle. Contestants face grueling military training and a brutal 5K run through Nevada’s desert, testing their endurance and mental toughness. As mentors and adversaries, Don and Randy push the contestants to their limits. This episode marks the beginning of an intense journey where only the strongest and most strategic will prevail.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The night mission is a go.. or so they thought. As the team readied for the night mission, word from HQ derails the plan. The team has to act fast to adapt to an ever-changing hostage situation. With an ingenious plan formed, some contestants have to go undercover to get the intel needed to complete the mission. See who this season's winner is on the nail-biter season finale of Surviving Mann.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: After a grueling night braving the elements, the second half of the challenge continues. The All-Stars and Space Cowboys are pushed to the limit when they are tasked with fabricating their own survival structures. Then, catastrophe strikes on the rope climbs, a timber hitch tests the group’s endurance and the day finishes off with Uncle Sam’s Misguided Children’s stress course. Will the All-Stars make it through? Only time will tell.

programme.title: NatureStream.tv
programme.desc: Your TV can be a window to a world of beauty, serenity, and well being. Our relaxing nature films and art displays can transform any environment into a natural oasis. Experiencing the beauty and wonder of nature helps reduce anxiety and stress, and increases positive emotions. Get your daily dose of awe & wonder with NatureStream.tv!
